title: Rotten Tomatoes Predicts the 2026 Golden Globes Winners
text: According to Rotten Tomatoes' predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes, Paul Thomas Anderson is predicted to win Best Director for his film 'One Battle After Another'. The article's explanation is notably succinct: 'Because he's winning it all.' This reasoning suggests that Anderson's film is positioned as a major frontrunner across multiple categories at the ceremony. The prediction reflects Anderson's acclaimed body of work and the strong positioning of 'One Battle After Another' throughout the awards season, where it has been competing closely with 'Sinners' as one of the two major contenders.
